text.text: Harness the power of AI to to create cutting-edge Power BI reports and dashboards with a simple theme editor and meticulously crafted templates.

subTitle.text: Power UI uses Tailwind CSS color palettes which are carefully crafted by expert designers and suitable for a wide range of different design styles.
